title: Tama’s Kidnapping Exposes Wano’s Cruelty
description: On pages 13–14, this part focuses on Kiku, Unknown person #13, Luffy, Unknown person #14, Zoro, Tama as Luffy and Zoro push into Kuri and Bakura Town as Tama’s kidnapping exposes the cruelty of the Beast Pirates.
scene: Luffy and Zoro move through Kuri and Bakura Town while Tama’s kidnapping pulls them into open conflict with the Beast Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Kiku
dialogue.text: Kiku came to see me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You lot, escort her to me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big bro, you're much better with the ladies than I thought you were!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I admire you even more, now!! But I should've expected as much!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Hey, more importantly... We're looking for someone!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: SHE'S A KID NAMED TAMA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...tell me where we can find the boss of this town!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: SHE SHOULD BE WITH HIM!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: That woman!! What a vexing Cinderella story!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's a bit bigger when compared to a normal woman, but she's perfect for urna!! (^)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Kya! Yeah!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, Zoro, why'd you let them take her!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Cutting down naked men is a bit...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey!! Isn't that the girl from that teahouse outside!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's impudent for a girl of such low-class to enter this town!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Really!? Chase her out!! She's vulgar and inferior!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: silence, you flithy commoners!! In the eyes of a Samuel...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You're all lower class!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your lives are insignificant... it is I who decides whether you live...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Or whether you die by my hand!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Isn't that right, Kikuuuuuuuuu?o 3e come my wifeeeeee.o

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do not know of anyone whom you refer to as lower class.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Suce...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Surely, you jest.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The only vulgar thing here is your heart.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The Yokozuna's top-knot.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Awesomemme meeeeee!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kiku
dialogue.text: Kiku is so cool!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's too early to be calling the boss out!!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kuri storyline with 30 dialogue beats. The rescue of Tama brings Luffy, Zoro, Kiku, and Law into direct contact with Wano’s local oppression.
